news_title: Psyence BioMed to Present at the H.C. Wainwright 27th Annual Global Investment Conference September 8-10, 2025
summary: Psyence BioMed (NASDAQ:PBM), a biopharmaceutical company focused on nature-derived psilocybin and ibogaine therapies for mental health, will present at theH.C. Wainwright 27th Annual Global Investment Conferencefrom September 8-10, 2025. The conference will be held at the Lotte New York Palace Hotel in New York City and virtually.CEODr. Neil Mareskywill present the company's business strategy and pipeline. The virtual presentation will be available on-demand startingSeptember 5, 2025, at 7:00 AM EST. Additionally, the company will host a separate webinar featuring its Scientific Advisory Board onSeptember 16, 2025, at 12:00 PM ESTto discuss ongoing clinical development programs and strategic initiatives.[]
